mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status, gender, create_time, update_time, last_login_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status, gender) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, #{gender})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, nickname, role, status) VALUES
(#{user.username}, #{user.password}, #{user.email}, #{user.phone}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.role}, #{user.status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE user SET role = #{role} WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM user WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user WHERE role = 2 AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

choose.when: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y年第%v周') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y年第%v周') ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y年%m月') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y年%m月') ORDER BY date ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN role = 1 THEN '普通用户' WHEN role = 2 THEN '员工' WHEN role = 3 THEN '管理员' ELSE '未知' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM user GROUP BY role
SELECT CASE WHEN gender = '男' THEN '男' WHEN gender = '女' THEN '女' ELSE '保密' END as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM user GROUP BY CASE WHEN gender = '男' THEN '男' WHEN gender = '女' THEN '女' ELSE '保密' END

SELECT CASE WHEN last_login_time IS NULL THEN '从未登录' WHEN last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN '高活跃（近7天）' WHEN last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN '中活跃（近30天）' ELSE '低活跃（30天以上）' END as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM user GROUP BY level ORDER BY CASE level WHEN '高活跃（近7天）' THEN 1 WHEN '中活跃（近30天）' THEN 2 WHEN '从未登录' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(last_login_time) = CURDATE()
